title: SMEMinds — Run Your Amazon India Account Like a Top Brand
tagline: The insider playbook from ex-Amazonians — trusted by 5,000+ sellers, in your pocket.
cta: Start FREE today — 5 modules, zero rupees, zero risk. Run your account like a cockpit. The insiders already moved — your turn.

scenes.heading: 5,000+ Sellers Know
scenes.vo: 5,000+ sellers. | Top brands. | Ex-Amazonians. | They all know something you don't. | While you guess and watch your margin leak, | they run a system. | Today, | I'm letting you in.

scenes.heading: The Insider Gap
scenes.vo: Here's the secret. | The sellers winning Amazon India aren't smarter, | and they aren't lucky. | They just know what insiders know. | SMEMinds hands you that exact edge — for sellers, vendors, brand owners, agencies and consultants done guessing.

scenes.heading: 63 Expert Modules
scenes.vo: So how do you get there? | Sixty-three expert modules. | Every one built by people who worked inside Amazon. | This is the exact playbook top brands pay big money to run, | reverse-engineered for you.

scenes.heading: 9 Growth Pillars
scenes.vo: All structured into nine growth pillars. | Account Management and Compliance. | Selection. | Listing Efficiency. | Traffic and Ads. | Conversion. | Speed and FBA Ops. | Seller Tools. | Brand Registry. | And Brand Protection. | Your entire account — covered.

scenes.heading: Learn It Fast
scenes.vo: No boring PDFs. | HD animated video lessons with crisp Indian-English narration. | Complex Amazon strategy — made dead simple. | You watch, | you get it, | you apply it the same day.

scenes.heading: Steal The Tools
scenes.vo: Theory is cheap, | so we hand you the tools the pros guard. | Downloadable SOP templates. | Operating checklists. | And marketplace calculators that show your real margin before you list. | Plug in | and profit.

scenes.heading: Prove Your Skill
scenes.vo: Then you prove it. | Knowledge quizzes lock in every lesson, | and you earn nine shareable pillar certifications. | Proof you run an account like a pro | that clients and partners instantly trust.

scenes.heading: You're Not Alone
scenes.vo: And you never figure it out alone. | A private community of serious sellers, | plus monthly live Q and A where ex-Amazon experts answer your exact problems. | Stuck at midnight before Prime Day? | We've got you.

scenes.heading: Go Elite
scenes.vo: Want the unfair advantage? | Go Elite. | One-on-one expert consulting, | and done-with-you account work — insiders building inside your account. | It's like hiring an ex-Amazonian on your team | and scaling without breaking.

scenes.heading: The Real Outcomes
scenes.vo: This is what changes. | Protect your margin. | Win the Buy Box. | Dodge suspensions. | Scale your revenue. | You stop reacting | and start commanding your account like a cockpit.

scenes.heading: Start FREE Today
scenes.vo: Here's the best part. | Start completely free — five full modules, zero rupees. | India-first pricing in rupees, working anywhere on Earth. | Upgrade only when you're hungry for more. | The insiders already moved. | Your turn — start now.
